title: MMWTB (Minecraft Mod With The Bois)
description: a collection of a bunch of random ideas
body:
![minecraft mod with the bois](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/984594417304346684/1057851144614989824/MMWTB_8x.png)
# It's MMWTB guys!
Before you ask, yes, I did get permission to upload this mod.
![lol](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/984594417304346684/1057828462716530759/image.png)
### A short history lesson:
Originally created by TrueUserunknown (more commonly known as "truser"), MMWTB is a mod that adds a bunch of random things to Minecraft. It eventually led to the creation of more mods (MMWTBGE, mmwtbsfxe, MMWTBCE, etc.) with the same concept. This, however, is just the original mod.
### General info:
The main reason why I'm uploading this mod is... well... it's pretty fun to play with. It adds armors, weapons, tools, biomes, foods, paintings, creatures, fluids, wood types, music, and even moss! Most of the things you'll see in here are ideas cast by a certain discord server. This mod is full of miscellaneous features that'll turn all you know about playing Minecraft on its head. Now, come on and have some fun!

"sorry if this description is a bit lacking, I'm really not very good at making intricate explanations :/" - Gabe
